rationale: Comprehensive Reef chart-widget hardening matching the PR description across 24 files. New `src/chat/reef/widget-fence-lint.ts` (static lint blocking `toExponential`, missing `.rw-chart`/`.mw-chart`, weak YAxis config, unquoted `var(--*)` inside `style={{}}`), `src/chat/reef/widget-prelude.ts` runtime probe (fails when `.recharts-responsive-container` height < 48px or axis ticks use scientific notation), `src/chat/reef/widget-repair.ts` silent auto-repair (up to 2 LLM fix-only retries on the latest assistant bubble while showing 'Checking widget…', then 'Preview unavailable' soft placeholder). New `src/tools/reef-widget-check.ts` browser tool combining static lint + `prepareReefWidgetHtml` + off-DOM iframe probe returning `{ ok, errors, warnings }`, registered in `src/tools/client.ts` / `src/tools/definitions.ts` and exposed to the `reef-widget` sub-agent via `src/agents/defaults/sub-agents.json` and the prompt files. Five Recharts widget templates updated (`snippet-chart-line.md`, `snippet-chart-bar.md`, `slider-graph.md`, `calculator-with-chart.md`, `pie-chart.md`) with `YAxis type='number' width={60}`, `toFixed` tick formatter, `margin.left >= 36`, and `React.createElement` where required. New `test/chat/reef/widget-fence-lint.test.mts`; extended `widget-snippets-conventions.test.mjs`. `widget-error-ui.ts` removes the technical error panel in favour of the silent repair loop. No cheat patterns.
